summary: Verified Mango/Sunflower/Chat/Task card image crop fix in Projects rotating cylinder. All four image cards now use object-contain (letterboxed on white bg) instead of object-cover, so full screenshot content (e.g., full 'Mango' text) is visible without side-cropping. Regression checks passed: cylinder renders 6 cards, modal opens with detail link, close button present, fullscreen toggle present, no horizontal page scroll on desktop 1440 or mobile 390, no runtime error overlay.
critical_code_review_comments: Minor: after clicking [data-testid=project-detail-close], the modal element remains queryable in DOM briefly — likely AnimatePresence exit anim. Not blocking. Consider checking is_visible instead of existence if this becomes a test flake.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Projects cylinder cards: 4 use images (mango, sunflower, chat, task) with className 'absolute inset-0 w-full h-full object-contain'. Natural image sizes ~1200x622 rendered at 248x164 (letterboxed). All good. Modal in Projects.jsx uses object-cover object-top for the large detail image (different from card thumbs — that is intentional).
